description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with clean white facades and large rectangular volumes arranged around a central axis. The structure is divided into three main sections, each with expansive glass windows that provide ample natural light and views of the surrounding green lawns. The central section is flanked by two wings, each with two stories and open, airy interiors visible through the transparent walls. The property includes a spacious, flat yard area, likely intended for recreational or garden use, and the overall layout suggests a focus on open-plan living. The exterior is predominantly white with black accents and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The house appears to have multiple entry points and large, accessible terraces or patios.
description: A modern, white multi-section house with large glass windows, flat roofs, and spacious green yards, arranged in a geometric, open-plan layout.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the central axis of the house, with the main entry and two green lawns extending to either side.
description_view_1: Top-down perspective highlighting the flat roof sections, the central courtyard, and the symmetrical arrangement of the house's wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrances, additional windows, and the continuation of the green yard areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the two main wings, their glass facades, and the central green space between them.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is minimalistic with a flat overhang, wide glass doors, and no visible steps or porch, emphasizing a seamless transition from exterior to interior.
